resultList.dtldesc: Nestled in the vibrant heart of Ahmedabad, this ready-to-move 3 BHK flat in Laxmi Sky City, Kathwada, promises an unparalleled lifestyle. With its prime location offering excellent connectivity to the SP Ring Road, this residence combines modern living with convenience. The breathtaking views from the 19th floor create an inviting ambiance, making it a perfect sanctuary for families seeking comfort and elegance.   Property specifications   Spanning a super area of 1350 sqft with a carpet area of 810 sqft, this spacious apartment is situated on the 19th floor of a 22-story building, offering breathtaking views and ample natural light. The flat is vaastu compliant with an east-facing orientation, promoting positive energy and harmony within the space. Every inch of this fully furnished home reflects thoughtful design, from the wardrobes and beds in all bedrooms to the ceramic tile flooring that adds a touch of elegance throughout.   The flat comprises three well-appointed bedrooms and two modern western-style bathroomsone attached and one common. The living cum dining area is expansive, providing a welcoming space for both relaxation and entertainment. A balcony attached to the living room offers a serene view of SP Ring Road, perfect for unwinding after a long day. The modular kitchen is equipped with a chimney and a piped gas connection, and theres a utility area attached for added convenience.   Facilities   Residents of Laxmi Sky City are treated to a plethora of facilities that enhance their living experience. An open car parking space ensures hassle-free parking, while the property boasts 24-hour water supply sourced from both borewell and corporation systems. Enjoy peace of mind with 100 power backup, security guard services, and CCTV surveillance throughout the premises. With three lifts for easy access, the community also features an impressive array of amenities, including a clubhouse, gym, swimming pool, theater, jogging track, and various indoor and outdoor games, alongside lush gardens and parks for relaxation and recreation.   Locality   The locality of Kathwada is strategically located near significant landmarks, opposite Sardar Patel Road and close to Dastan Circle. The area is well-equipped with essential services, including schools and hospitals, as well as shopping malls and supermarkets for all your daily needs. Banks and ATMs are conveniently nearby to facilitate easy transactions.    Public transport is readily accessible, with buses and auto-rickshaws available at your doorstep. The railway station is just a 30-minute drive away, while the metro station is a mere 12 minutes away, ensuring that youre never far from the hustle and bustle of the city. This property is not just a home its a gateway to a lifestyle defined by comfort, convenience, and community.

resultList.dtldesc: A gorgeous 4BHK apartment with a servant quarter is waiting for you and your family to make it your permanent home. Be a part of its calming yet energising ambience to lead a comfortable life. This apartment is for sale in Shree Balaji Wind Park, Vaishno Devi, which is one of the most upscale localities of Ahmedabad.::::::Property Specifications::::::This home is designed to adapt to the contemporary living needs of new homeowners and to create an exciting new experience. Another major advantage of going with this property is, complete furniture is available in this house so residents are relieved from the stress of furnishing it right from scratch. All the rooms are blessed with immense natural light and the smooth flow of soft breeze across every nook of the house is simply amazing.::::::The super area of the apartment is around 4000sqft and carpet area is of 2923sqft, also the property is located on the 9th floor in a building of total 12 floors. With south-east facing, the property comes with 4 bedrooms, 6 bathrooms, 1 living room, 1 dining area, 1 pooja room, 1 servant room and 1 modular kitchen. Up to date with electrical fittings, the flooring is beautified with granite and vitrified tiles which bring a nice and classy look to the apartment. ::::::Along with the utility area, the kitchen incorporates a chimney, piped gas connection, cabinets, granite platform and sink making it an ideal place to cook meals for your loved ones. The servant room has an attached bathroom with a western toilet while 4 bathrooms are attached to the bedroom and 1 bathroom is meant for common use. All the attached bathrooms including the common bathroom come with western toilets and geysers.::::::In terms of furnishing and appliances, there are wardrobes, sofa set, dining table, water purifier, ACs, fridge and washing machine available.::::::Facilities::::::The Shree Balaji Wind Park is equipped with all the modern facilities and amenities, such as 2 Lifts, Swimming Pool, Gymnasium, Park, Reserved Parking, Security, CCTV Cameras, Private Terrace/Garden, Air Conditioned, Internet/Wi-Fi Connectivity, RO Water System, Piped Gas, Island Kitchen Layout and Golf Course.::::::Other notable facilities available for this apartment are 2 covered parking slots, water supply for 24 hours and power backup.::::::Locality::::::The location offers wonderful access to surrounding areas and social amenities. One can conveniently commute from one place to another, as various modes of public transport service are easily available. The property is even close to the Ring road, Vaishno Devi Circle, Nirma University and KD Hospital. Moving on, you have access to many of the well-known malls, supermarkets, banks and ATMs within the vicinity.
